config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last two states were A then B. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

trials.response_content:

I'm waiting to see if the next state is B. If it is, then I will have seen A followed by B, and I should respond with [ACT]. If the next state is anything other than B, the sequence resets.
